title: LegendaryDeathChest
body:
### **LEGENDARY DEATH CHEST**

## Features
- Death chest after player death
- Hologram with timer
- configurable chest uptime
- shift + right click for qucik pick up

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11c6288691d5f856a912f254b6f35133d6ffddd9.png)

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e03f0cdcf99af759c36c1349b2ac2c877610d8d.png)
